rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains a material logical gap: the paragraph asserting 'unique cost-optimal policy under every monotone utility' does not follow from low MSE on the binary success indicator alone; a Bayes-decision-theory argument is needed. Whether resolving this is load-bearing depends on whether 'stronger' targets argumentative rigor.
rationale.R1.3: The optimality claim ('any deviation strictly increases expected deployment cost') is not grounded in the empirical results presented (38%/97% figures); the stated evidence does not close the gap to that theoretical conclusion.
rationale.R1.6: 'Make this stronger' naturally includes writing-level force—tightening sentences, sharpening the lead contribution claim, and removing hedge-like passive constructions—but it is ambiguous whether this or logical repair is the primary intent.
